## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Privacy Check

- [ ] This change does not commit real private email content, raw `.eml` files, private inbox screenshots, API keys, or sensitive logs.
- [ ] If this touches scan content, uploads, OCR, parsing, logging, or AI prompts, I described the privacy impact.
- [ ] User-facing copy avoids certainty claims.
- [ ] The required disclaimer remains visible where relevant.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:analysis`
- [ ] `npm run test:security`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] `npm run build`
